content.full_text:
Free fundraising ticket for lobbyist.

In response to a question from Larry McConnell of Senator Deukmejian's office, we advised that a lobbyist may accept a free fundraising ticket from a friend. We emphasized that the lobbyist could play no role in obtaining the ticket or in suggesting the purchase of such a ticket to the friend. See the standard set forth in the Zierold letter and the Jerry Augustine memo.

Consulted with Ken Finney on July 27, 1977.
